subcodes.first_line: I bear witness that there is none other God but Him, in acknowledgement of that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath testified before the creation of the heavens and earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد ان لا اله الا هو اعترافا بما شهد به لسان العظمه قبل خلق السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God
